# Ratchet Rebaseline Approval 2026-05-20

Approved-by: Repository owner via chat request
Reason: Authorize the same-change protected-path cleanup that removes stale full-coverage entries from `artifacts/analysis/file_debt_ratchet.json` after `ratchet-policy` began running in full repo-audit and correctly detected that these files now meet the 100% coverage target.
